---
title: "Site Map"
---

## Content Types

| Type | Meaning |
|------|----------|
| **VERBATIM** | Source `.md` morphed to `.qmd` with YAML frontmatter added; content preserved exactly |
| **COMPOSED** | Authored by the Publishing Writer; synthesized from one or more raw sources per the contract brief |
| **GENERATED** | Produced by a pre-render script from a verbatim source, with transforms applied (e.g., mermaid diagram injection) |
| **REDIRECT** | Transit `.qmd` stub that forwards the browser to a standalone rendered HTML file |

## Navigation Structure

```text
Frontend 22 — EDA-3 Developer Briefing Site
│
├── 🏠  Index                      COMPOSED  ← initial.prompt + README + mission + eda-3.qmd + pipeline.md
│
├── Project
│   ├── Mission                    VERBATIM  ← ai/project/mission.md
│   ├── Method                     VERBATIM  ← ai/project/method.md
│   ├── Glossary                   VERBATIM  ← ai/project/glossary.md
│   └── Summary                    COMPOSED  ← mission + method + README + report-contract
│
├── Pipeline
│   ├── Pipeline Guide             GENERATED ← manipulation/pipeline.md (bridge + mermaid include)
│   └── Cache Manifest             VERBATIM  ← data-public/metadata/CACHE-manifest.md
│
├── Analysis
│   ├── EDA                        REDIRECT  → edited_content/analysis/eda-3.html
│   └── Report                     COMPOSED  ← eda-3.qmd + report-contract + figure inputs
│
└── Docs
    ├── README                     GENERATED ← README.md (link/context adaptation)
    ├── Site Map                   COMPOSED  ← _frontend-22/publishing-contract.prompt.md
    └── Publisher Notes            VERBATIM  ← .github/publishing-orchestra-3.md
```
